response.justification: While Rodriguez demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and current exposure to MCP and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, the resume falls significantly short of the core requirement: 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. The AI/GenAI experience appears to have begun only 2 months ago (April 2025). Additionally, Python—a stated required technology—is not mentioned in the skills section, and critical expertise areas (vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance metrics, multi-agent frameworks) are absent. The candidate would require substantial ramp-up time on the specific AI/GenAI technical stack required for this staff-level, customer-facing role.
strengths: Strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise with 20 years of software development experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, data systems)
Current role directly involves MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and AI-agent infrastructure, showing emerging familiarity with the target technical domain
Proven ability to work at staff/senior level with teaching/mentorship background and successful navigation of multiple technology transitions
concerns: No Python experience despite it being a stated required technology; resume shows only JavaScript/TypeScript, D, Java, and C/C++
AI/GenAI experience is extremely recent (started April 2025, ~2 months) versus the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions

Missing critical technical depth in required areas: vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance metrics, LangGraph/CrewAI, and cloud platform maturity (only AWS CDK mentioned, no GCP/Azure evidence)
